question_text: How often do you consume fruits in a week?
What is your favorite fruit and why?
Do you prefer eating fruits whole or in other forms (e.g., juice, smoothie)?
On a scale of 1 to 5, how important is fruit in your diet?
Are there any fruits you dislike? If so, why?
How much money do you spend on fruits in a typical month?
What is your favorite season to eat fruit and why?
Do you think fruit is more of a snack or dessert?
Have you ever grown your own fruits?
How would you rate the importance of organic fruit versus non-organic fruit?
